With its charming community vibe and vibrant celebration of nature, the Coronado Flower Show is a must-attend event for garden enthusiasts and those seeking a picturesque spring outing.

title: San Diego EarthFest
description: Save the planet at the San Diego EarthFest in San Diego, CA, where thousands of visitors look for ways to live a more sustainable life and promote a clean, healthy environment. The fair features over 100 eco-friendly exhibitors, live entertainment, and activities for kids. If you want to get into a green routine, then walk down to the San Diego EarthFest.

title: Excited to share my picks for @dicefm. With my upcoming show at @barbicancentre May 27, I’m showing
description: Excited to share my picks for @dicefm. With my upcoming show at @barbicancentre May 27, I’m showing you what London sounds like to me. If you want to check them out, I’ve left the link in my bio :)

title: Deep Sea
description: <p>Directed by San Diego resident and world-renowned underwater cinematographer Howard Hall, Deep Sea will transport audiences deep below the ocean surface to swim with some of the most exotic creatures on the planet, from the bizarre Rainbow Nudibranch to the Giant Pacific Octopus. Complementing the educational mission of the Fleet, Deep Sea will inspire audiences, not only with breathtaking <a href="https://balboapark.org/event/deep-sea/2026-05-28/" class="more-link">...</a></p>\n

title: FNGRS CRSSD: LEE FOSS
description: FNGRS CRSSD presents a live performance by LEE FOSS at Quartyard. The event is for attendees aged 21 and over, with doors opening at 4:00 PM. It is a music event held at an outdoor venue in San Diego.

title: Mira Mesa Independence Day Celebration
description: The Mira Mesa Independence Day Celebration in San Diego brings the community together for an afternoon and evening of festivities. Attendees can enjoy a lively picnic atmosphere with food trucks, local vendors, and craft booths, as well as a car show in the north parking lot. The highlight of the event is a spectacular fireworks display, lighting up the night sky for all to enjoy. This celebration offers a fun and welcoming way for families and friends to mark Independence Day in Mira Mesa.

title: Blockbuster Broadway
description: Broadway’s biggest songs come alive in this concert featuring top vocalists from New York. You’ll hear show-stopping tunes from hits like Wicked, The Phantom of the Opera, Annie, and more. The San Diego Symphony Orchestra brings these beloved show tunes to life at The Rady Shell at Jacobs Park.

title: North by Northwest
description: The Old Globe presents the North American premiere of North by Northwest, adapted and directed by Emma Rice. This inventive theatrical take on the Alfred Hitchcock classic follows a man, Roger Thornhill, as he is mistaken for a spy and embarks on a high-speed chase filled with danger and intrigue. With a swinging '50s soundtrack and a cast of six shape-shifting performers, the production offers a fresh and funny experience set against the iconic Mount Rushmore.

title: Coronado Fourth of July
description: Celebrate Independence Day in Coronado, San Diego, with a full day of festivities along Orange Avenue and throughout the community. The event features lively pre-parade entertainment, a beloved parade route, and family-friendly activities like the Adrian Empire demonstration and a Star Wars photo-op at Star Park. Enjoy live music with a kids’ Disney concert and a patriotic performance by the Coronado Concert Band at Spreckels Park. The day concludes with a spectacular fireworks show at the Coronado Golf Course, accompanied by a synchronized soundtrack on KYXY Radio.

title: America The Beautiful: 250
description: Byron Stripling’s America The Beautiful: 250 brings the sound of the nation to life with powerful works reflecting America's beauty, complexity, and spirit. The program includes classics like “Puttin’ on the Ritz,” “Yankee Doodle Dandy,” and “Stars and Stripes Forever.” Enjoy this celebration of 250 years of America at the waterfront with the San Diego Symphony Orchestra and a premium view of the Big Bay Boom fireworks.

title: Mark Farina
description: Mark Farina is a renowned DJ and producer known for his influential role in house music and his innovative Mushroom Jazz genre. You will experience his signature style alongside Cris Herrera and CJ Posada b2b Kenny Lane at this lively show. The event takes place at Music Box in downtown San Diego, promising a night of dynamic dance music.

title: Red, White, and BOOM 4th of July Fireworks
description: Celebrate Independence Day at LEGOLAND California Resort with Red, White, and BOOM, a family-friendly event packed with festive activities and themed entertainment throughout the park. Guests can enjoy exclusive treats, lively lawn games, and energetic DJ dance parties, all included with regular admission. The highlight of the evening is a dazzling fireworks show, where special glasses transform the display into a burst of 3D LEGO bricks for a unique viewing experience. Extended park hours let families make the most of this unforgettable holiday celebration.

title: Liberty Station Relay and 5K
description: The Liberty Station Relay and 5K takes place in San Diego on July 4, 2026. You can choose to run distances ranging from 5 kilometers up to a full marathon relay. Check the official website for the latest updates and details about the event.

title: San Diego 5K
description: The San Diego 5K takes place in San Diego on July 4, 2026. You have the option to run a 10-kilometer distance. Check the organizer's website for the latest updates and details.

title: Open Water Swim (Coronado 4th July)
description: Coronado’s Crown City Open Water Swim is a celebrated Independence Day weekend tradition in San Diego, California, drawing swimmers of all ages. Participants enjoy a range of distances, from the Youth 250M Dash to the challenging 3K Open Water Swim, all set against the stunning backdrop of the Coronado Bridge. Supported by the local swim community, including Coronado Swim Team Elite, the event offers a welcoming atmosphere for both newcomers and seasoned athletes. This open water swim is a highlight for families, clubs, and the broader community, making it a must-attend summer experience.

title: Let The Sunshine In: The Music of ’69
description: The concert celebrates the spirit and music of 1969, highlighting the Woodstock and Harlem Cultural Festivals. Award-winning vocalists join the San Diego Symphony Orchestra to perform a mix of rock, funk, and soul anthems from that era. The event captures the bold and rebellious energy of a generation defined by peace and love.

title: Serving C*nt
description: Sarah Hester Ross brings a bold blend of feminist musical comedy and sharp satire in Serving C*nt. Her powerhouse vocals and witty humor create a cabaret experience that challenges and entertains. Known for her viral social media presence and Grammy consideration, Sarah offers a fresh voice in comedy and cabaret.

title: The Polish Ambassador
description: The Polish Ambassador is a musician and producer known for his EDM/live crossover style. This event features live art and a full stage production with vendors at Quartyard. The performance is scheduled for the evening and is intended for attendees aged 21 and over.

title: DJ Lex
description: DJ Lex is performing a live show at SOMA San Diego. The event features general admission with standing room only and is open to all ages. Craft beer will be available during the event.

title: This Is My Baby Podcast Live
description: Celebrate milestones that usually go unrecognized with This Is My Baby Podcast Live. Sarah Hester Ross and David Ian join the Diversionary Theatre for a special live recording that honors achievements beyond weddings and babies. The event highlights personal victories like quitting a job or choosing yourself, making space for stories that deserve celebration.

title: A Perfect Tool: A Tribute to Tool and Perfect Circle
description: Tribute band A Perfect Tool celebrates the music of A Perfect Circle and Tool with high-energy performances. You'll hear hits spanning over a decade, delivered with a dark, ethereal hard rock sound. The band is known for creating a unique live experience that resonates with fans of these iconic groups.

title: Candlelight: Vivaldi's Four Seasons and More
description: Candlelight concerts create a unique atmosphere by combining live music with the warm glow of candlelight in inspiring venues. Experience the timeless compositions of Vivaldi's Four Seasons alongside other classical and contemporary pieces performed by the Range Ensemble string quartet. The event takes place at the Fleet Science Center, offering a 60-minute immersive musical journey.

title: Seaport Village 5K
description: The Seaport Village 5K takes place in San Diego on Sunday, July 12, 2026. You can run a 5-kilometer course along the scenic waterfront area. Check the organizer's website for the latest updates and details.

title: Beethoven by the Bay
description: Beethoven's powerful music fills the open air at The Rady Shell at Jacobs Park with the San Diego Symphony performing his Piano Concerto No. 5, known as the “Emperor.” Pianist Parker Van Ostrand brings the concerto's noble themes and dazzling finale to life alongside the orchestra. The program also includes Beethoven's Overture to Egmont and Symphony No. 4, making for a rich evening of classical music.

title: Beauty and the Beast
description: Beauty and the Beast is Disney’s first North American touring production of the beloved musical in over 25 years. The production features spectacular new sets and dazzling costumes, with the Oscar-winning and Tony Award-nominated score including classic songs such as “Be Our Guest” and “Beauty and the Beast.” The show reunites members of the original Tony Award-winning artistic team and offers a magical experience suitable for audiences ages 6 and up.

title: San Diego Black Pride
description: San Diego Black Pride is a dynamic three-day celebration in San Diego, California, dedicated to honoring and empowering the Black LGBTQ+ community. This volunteer-driven festival brings together bold cultural programming, energetic nightlife, and inclusive community gatherings. Highlights include The Mini Ball, captivating drag performances, live music, and the lively Sunday Festival. Attendees can expect a welcoming atmosphere that fosters connection, creativity, and pride.

title: Dogfight O.B.S.
description: Dogfight O.B.S. is a musical set on November 21, 1963, about three young Marines on the eve of deployment to Southeast Asia. The story follows Corporal Eddie Birdlace, who meets Rose, an awkward waitress, and enlists her to win a cruel bet. Rose changes the course of the night by teaching Eddie about love and compassion.

title: Distant Worlds: Music from FINAL FANTASY
description: Celebrate the 25th anniversary of FINAL FANTASY X with Maestro Arnie Roth, the San Diego Symphony Orchestra, and the San Diego Master Chorale. Experience iconic music by Nobuo Uematsu, including selections from across the FINAL FANTASY series, accompanied by HD video created by SQUARE ENIX. This multimedia concert offers a unique blend of orchestral performance and visual storytelling at The Rady Shell at Jacobs Park.

title: Pride of Hillcrest Block Party
description: The Pride of Hillcrest Block Party is a lively kickoff to San Diego Pride Weekend, bringing together thousands in the heart of Hillcrest, San Diego’s LGBTQ+ cultural district. This multi-day festival features energetic dance floors, live entertainment, and a welcoming community atmosphere. Organized by Fabulous Hillcrest and San Diego Pride, the event transforms the neighborhood into a celebration of diversity and inclusion, drawing locals and visitors alike. It’s a must-attend experience for anyone looking to celebrate Pride in one of the city’s most historic and inclusive neighborhoods.

title: San Diego LGBT Pride Parade
description: San Diego Pride Parade, held in the heart of Hillcrest, San Diego, is the region’s largest single-day civic event, drawing over 250,000 supporters each year. Celebrating diversity, inclusion, and LGBTQIA+ pride, the parade is a powerful display of community spirit and unity. Organized by San Diego Pride, a nonprofit dedicated to advocacy and year-round programs, the event’s theme “Pride Shines On” highlights the ongoing commitment to equality and support for all. Attendees can expect an inspiring atmosphere filled with joy, solidarity, and opportunities to make a lasting impact.

title: How to Train Your Dragon 2 in Concert
description: DreamWorks' How to Train Your Dragon 2 is a thrilling sequel that continues the story of Hiccup and Toothless. The San Diego Symphony Orchestra performs John Powell's score live while the movie plays in HD, creating an immersive experience. This concert at The Rady Shell at Jacobs Park offers a captivating evening for families and fans of the film.

title: Buffett Beach Band: A Tribute to Jimmy Buffett
description: If you enjoy the laid-back vibes of Jimmy Buffett, the Buffett Beach Band brings that experience to life with authentic vocals and engaging stories. Their 8-piece band, including female vocals and a horn section, captures the spirit of a full-scale Jimmy Buffett show. Expect a fun evening filled with familiar tunes and a lively atmosphere.

title: Cyrano
description: Cyrano tells the story of a brilliant poet and swordsman who hides his love behind a mask of wit and bravado. The play explores themes of love, insecurity, and bravery through a lively and touching adaptation of the classic Cyrano de Bergerac. You will find a mix of comedy and romance that celebrates love in all its forms.

title: ABBA Under The Stars
description: You can enjoy an evening celebrating ABBA's greatest hits with a unique live music experience at Sunset Terrace. The event offers breathtaking views of San Diego and a laid-back atmosphere with classic cocktails and lite bites available. It's a great choice if you appreciate iconic pop music and want a fun night out with beautiful ocean views.

title: Over the Line World Championships
description: The World Championship Over-the-Line Tournament is a lively beach sports event in San Diego, California, where teams of three compete in a fast-paced softball game unique to the city. Hosted by the Old Mission Beach Athletic Club, this tournament has been a San Diego tradition for over 70 years, drawing crowds of players and spectators from around the globe. Known for its laid-back, adults-only atmosphere, the event features creative team costumes, beach tents, and plenty of fun, making it a must-see for anyone looking to experience a true local favorite. Whether you’re a sports enthusiast or just want to enjoy a day at the beach, Over-the-Line offers an unforgettable summer experience.

title: Community Open Studio
description: Community Open Studio invites you to explore your creativity in the SDMA Museum Art Studio. You can work with drawing, painting, and mixed media using the provided materials or your own supplies. The event is pay-what-you-wish and limited to 20 participants per session.

title: Live Model Drawing
description: Live Model Drawing invites you to develop your figure drawing skills by observing a live, clothed model in the SDMA Museum Art Studio. Materials are provided, or you can bring your own, with a request to avoid oil paints and solvents. The session is pay-what-you-wish and limited to 20 participants, offering a focused and creative environment.

title: Struggle Jennings
description: Struggle Jennings is a musical performance by the artist Struggle Jennings, who is known for his unique blend of Outlaw Hip Hop and Rock and Roll. He is the grandson of country music icon Waylon Jennings and has built a loyal fanbase through his message of strength and determination. The event showcases his personal journey and contributions to the Jennings family legacy.

title: Allison Euforia
description: Allison is a prominent power pop metal band from Latin America with over thirteen years of experience. They have won three gold albums and one platinum album and are promoting their fourth studio album under the label Nítido Records. The band is on a tour across Mexico, Latin America, and the United States, performing songs from their new album.

title: Hermanos Espinoza
description: Hermanos Espinoza brings their Linaje Tour to SOMA San Diego for an evening of live music. The show starts at 7 pm on the mainstage, offering a chance to enjoy their vibrant sound in an intimate setting. VIP packages include early entry, exclusive merchandise, and a meet and greet experience.

title: Moana Jr. (Summer 2026)
description: Disney’s Moana Jr. is a 60-minute musical adaptation of the 2016 animated film, featuring beloved songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda and others. The story follows Moana as she embarks on a journey across the Pacific to save her village and discover her heritage. Rehearsals and performances take place at Trinity Theatre Company with a cast of young actors aged 8 to 18.

title: One More Time: A Tribute to Daft Punk
description: One More Time is a tribute act recreating the iconic Daft Punk experience with lights, remixes, and costumes. The duo from Phoenix, Arizona, performs a setlist based on Daft Punk's live album Alive 2007 and uses a production team to approximate the architecture of Daft Punk's final tour. The act has grown from a college Halloween party to a legitimate touring business with performances at notable venues.

title: That's Not Me Comedy
description: This event is a comedy show presented by Perritos Only. It is scheduled to take place at The Magnolia in El Cajon, California. The show is for attendees aged 21 and over with a valid ID, and doors open at 6 PM with the show starting at 8 PM.

title: Solana Beach Triathlon and Duathlon
description: The Solana Beach Triathlon and Duathlon is a popular coastal race festival in California, welcoming athletes of all abilities. Participants can choose from a variety of race formats, including a Sprint Triathlon, Duathlon, Aquabike, Aquathlon, and a 5K run, all featuring a surf-entry swim, a fast bike course along the Pacific Coast Highway, and a scenic run by the ocean. The event is organized by KOZ Events and supports the Life Sports Foundation, helping at-risk youth. After crossing the finish line, racers and spectators enjoy a festive atmosphere with live music, breakfast, and a craft beer garden.

title: Comic Con International San Diego
description: Comic-Con International in San Diego is a world-renowned celebration of comics, pop culture, and entertainment, drawing fans from across the globe. Attendees can immerse themselves in panels with industry creators, exclusive screenings, and interactive experiences spanning comics, movies, TV, and gaming. The event is famous for its creative cosplay, diverse programming, and a massive Exhibit Hall filled with collectibles and displays for every fandom. Whether you're a lifelong fan or new to the scene, Comic-Con offers an unforgettable experience at the heart of pop culture.

title: ha ha ha ha ha ha ha
description: Julia Masli’s award-winning solo show, ha ha ha ha ha ha ha, brings a mix of clowning, surreal social experiments, and audience-driven spontaneity to the stage. The performance transforms the Mandell Weiss Forum into a lively playground of humor and unexpected tenderness. It’s an improvised experience that changes every night, inviting you to be part of the fun and connection.

title: On the Spot: An Improvised Musical
description: San Diego’s On the Spot: An Improvised Musical is a show where every song, story, and character is created live from audience suggestions. The performance blends comedy, music, and improvisational theater into a unique experience that changes every time. The cast includes talented performers accompanied by live keyboard music, making each show fresh and entertaining.

title: The Music of John Williams
description: Few composers have shaped our emotional memory like John Williams, whose music has defined some of the most iconic films. This concert features beloved classics from movies such as Star Wars, Indiana Jones, Superman, and E.T., performed by the San Diego Symphony Orchestra under conductor David Newman. Experience the powerful soundtracks that have become an essential part of cinematic history in an outdoor setting at the Rady Shell.

title: Hadestown (Teen Edition Summer 2026)
description: Hadestown: Teen Edition offers a folk opera experience centered on two intertwining love stories set against a backdrop of classic American folk and vintage New Orleans jazz. The production follows young dreamers Orpheus and Eurydice alongside King Hades and Persephone on a journey to the underworld and back. This full-length adaptation is designed for teen performers and family audiences, blending themes of industry, nature, doubt, faith, fear, and love.

title: Uncorked: Del Mar Summer Wine Fest
description: Uncorked: Del Mar Summer Wine Fest invites guests to experience a lively day of wine tasting in California. Enjoy over 100 selections of wines, bubbles, and cocktails from around the globe while taking in live horse racing and scenic trackside views. The festival also features live music, a variety of food trucks, and a festive summer atmosphere perfect for wine lovers and friends. It’s a must-attend event for those looking to savor great drinks and unforgettable moments under the California sun.

title: St. Vincent with the San Diego Symphony Orchestra
description: St. Vincent brings nearly 20 years of innovative music to a unique orchestral setting with the San Diego Symphony Orchestra. Grammy-winning conductor Jules Buckley leads the orchestra in symphonic reinterpretations of songs from St. Vincent's acclaimed albums. The concert offers a fresh way to experience her eclectic and celebrated body of work.

title: Heiva San Diego
description: Heiva San Diego is a dynamic celebration of Tahitian and South Pacific culture, featuring exhilarating traditional dance competitions and live Polynesian drumming. Since its founding in 2010 by Reva Tahiti Productions, the festival has brought together talented performers for solo and group showcases in 'Ori Tahiti, as well as the spirited Mr. and Miss Heiva San Diego cultural pageant. Attendees can explore a bustling marketplace offering authentic island cuisine, artisan crafts, and live demonstrations by renowned Pacific Island artists and tattoo experts. This multi-day event invites guests of all ages to experience the energy, artistry, and heritage of the Pacific Islands.

title: Much Ado About Nothing
description: Love, laughter, and mischief take center stage in one of Shakespeare's greatest romantic comedies. The story follows Beatrice and Benedick, whose friends scheme to bring them together amid mistaken identities and humorous twists. Barry Edelstein directs this fast-paced production at the Lowell Davies Festival Theatre.

title: The Western UnScripted
description: The Western UnScripted is a comedy inspired by classic Western films. Impro Theatre creates a new full-length play each show using audience suggestions, featuring characters like cattle barons, sheriffs, and saloon girls. The performance captures the style of Westerns by John Ford and Howard Hawks with improvised storytelling.

title: Mexican Institute of Sound and Meridian Brothers
description: Mexican Institute of Sound and Meridian Brothers bring a vibrant blend of Latin American sounds and experimental music to Quartyard. The Mexican Institute of Sound celebrates Mexico's rich cultural heritage with a mix of nostalgic and fresh sounds, while Meridian Brothers add a theatrical neo-tropicalista flair from Colombia. Food and drinks from El Comal complement the lively atmosphere for an engaging evening.

title: Beach Bunny and The Beths
description: Beach Bunny and The Beths are performing together as part of their US Tour 2026. The event is scheduled for the evening with a start time of 7 pm on the mainstage. The concert is all ages with general admission standing room only and a clear bag policy in place.

title: Best of San Diego Party
description: Best of San Diego Party is a lively summer gathering that showcases the city’s top restaurants, breweries, wineries, distilleries, and local businesses, all celebrated in the magazine’s annual “Best Of” issues. Guests enjoy unlimited tastings from more than 90 vendors, live entertainment, creative photo opportunities, and plenty of space to relax or dance. The event is known for its energetic atmosphere and curated experiences, from specialty drinks to spa treatments, making it a must-attend for foodies and locals alike.

title: Disney ’80s-’90s Celebration in Concert
description: Celebrate the best Disney and Pixar hits from the 1980s and 1990s with Broadway-star vocalists and the San Diego Symphony Orchestra. The concert features iconic songs from beloved movies like Hercules, Toy Story, The Lion King, and Beauty and the Beast, accompanied by rock-concert lighting and animation. Experience a nostalgic musical journey with standout performances from acclaimed stage artists.

title: The Jazz Room: A Journey to the Heart of New Orleans
description: You can enjoy a live jazz music performance that transports you to the roots of New Orleans jazz with a mix of classics and improvisation. The event offers a soulful and intimate experience in a chic bar setting, perfect for those who appreciate sophisticated live music. It's a great choice if you want to immerse yourself in the spirit and history of jazz while enjoying talented musicians and vocalists.

title: Day We Ran
description: Day We Ran is a guitar-driven alternative rock band known for anthem rock with driving riffs, three-part harmonies, and story-driven melodies. In 2026, the band is touring North America on their debut headline tour following a year supporting Sam Fender and The Kooks on their UK Arena Tour. The band has amassed over 50 million streams on their first four songs and is recognized for their engaging live shows and charismatic stage presence.

title: San Diego Brew Festival
description: The San Diego Brew Festival at NTC Park in Liberty Station brings together craft beer lovers for an afternoon of tasting from over 70 breweries and sampling more than 200 unique beers. Attendees can enjoy a lively atmosphere with top local food trucks, live cover bands, and classic lawn games. This popular event has been a staple in San Diego’s beer scene for over a decade, offering a fun and social way to experience the city’s renowned brewing culture. Whether you’re a seasoned beer enthusiast or just looking for a great day out, the festival promises something for everyone.

title: Farm to Bay
description: Farm to Bay in Chula Vista, California, is a celebrated tasting event that highlights the region’s best food, wine, and craft beverages. Guests can sample offerings from top local restaurants, breweries, and wineries while enjoying sunset views over San Diego Bay. The event features up-close encounters with the center’s wildlife ambassadors, including endangered sea turtles and raptors, and supports vital coastal conservation and sustainability programs. With a strong zero-waste commitment, Farm to Bay offers a unique blend of culinary excellence and environmental stewardship for guests 21 and older.

title: Stayin’ Alive: A Tribute to The Bee Gees and Beyond with RAJATON and The San Diego Symphony Orchestra
description: Renowned Finnish pop sensation Rajaton joins the San Diego Symphony Orchestra for a night filled with disco hits from The Bee Gees and more. Expect to hear classics like “Night Fever,” “More Than a Woman,” and “Grease” performed with smooth harmonies. The concert invites you to embrace the spirit of the iconic disco era with lively music and dance.

title: Mojo Risin: A Tribute to The Doors
description: Mojo Risin is a tribute band based in Los Angeles that honors The Doors by performing their classic hits. The band features professional musicians who aim to deliver a respectful and nuanced tribute to the legendary group. The lead singer, John Nagle, closely resembles Jim Morrison in both voice and appearance, supported by skilled band members portraying the original Doors members.

title: Del Mar Summer Twilight Concerts
description: The Del Mar Summer Twilight Concerts at Powerhouse Park, Del Mar, California, offer a beloved tradition where the community gathers to enjoy live music, dancing, and picnics against the backdrop of stunning ocean sunsets. Established in 1983 by the Del Mar Foundation, this series has brought together friends, families, and neighbors for over four decades. Attendees can look forward to a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere and a lineup of four concerts each summer, making it a highlight of the season for music lovers of all ages. Bring your picnic blanket and join in for an unforgettable evening by the sea.

title: Meghan Trainor
description: Meghan Trainor will perform at Viejas Arena as part of The Get In Girl Tour. The event features Icona Pop as a supporting act. It is scheduled to start at 6:30 pm on August 11, 2026.

title: Community Art Workshop
description: Artists of all ages are invited to participate in hands-on art making inspired by the creative processes of artists featured at the museum. These workshops take place monthly on the second Thursday and provide all materials needed for your creative experience. Children under 18 must be accompanied by an adult throughout the session.

title: The Gershwins in Hollywood with Michael Feinstein
description: Hollywood’s Golden Age comes alive through the music of George and Ira Gershwin in this concert. You’ll hear iconic film songs that capture the glamour and spirit of classic American cinema. The San Diego Symphony Orchestra, led by conductor Rob Fisher and featuring Michael Feinstein on piano and vocals, delivers a night of jazz-infused melodies and timeless charm.

title: Candlelight: A Tribute to Adele
description: Candlelight: A Tribute to Adele is a live musical experience featuring a string quartet performing Adele's music under candlelight at the Fleet Science Center in San Diego. The concert lasts 60 minutes, with doors opening 45 minutes before the show and closing 5 minutes before the start. The event is designed for audiences aged 8 and older, with assigned seating on a first-come, first-served basis within each zone.

title: Noche de Cumbia: Wachiwara, The Sleepwalkers, Las Sucias
description: Noche de Cumbia brings together Wachiwara from LA, local band The Sleepwalkers, and DJs Las Sucias for an evening of nonstop cumbia music. The event runs for four hours, starting at 5 PM, and promises plenty of dancing. Food is available from the award-winning El Comal, and the event is for guests aged 21 and over.

title: Candlelight: '90s Hip-Hop on Strings
description: Candlelight: '90s Hip-Hop on Strings is a live musical experience featuring string quartet renditions of iconic '90s hip-hop songs. The event is performed by the Range Ensemble in San Diego at the Fleet Science Center. The concert lasts 60 minutes and is designed to be an immersive, multi-sensory experience under candlelight.

title: Little Shop of Horrors feat. Ellen Greene
description: Celebrate the 40th Anniversary of Little Shop of Horrors with a screening hosted by the original Audrey, Ellen Greene. This rare appearance honors the cult-classic 1986 sci-fi musical comedy about a nerdy florist and his man-eating plant. VIP tickets include premium seating and a pre-show meet and greet with Ellen Greene, complete with signed memorabilia and photo opportunities.

title: Good Ol’ Boyz
description: Good Ol’ Boyz are a gritty, authentic Southern roots band from Northern California, known for blending outlaw country, bluegrass, and Southern rock into a raw, front-porch sound. Their music features tight musicianship, banjo-driven grooves, and street-level storytelling that captures hard work, brotherhood, and everyday life truths. They deliver a high-energy, no-frills vibe that connects with fans who appreciate honest and soulful music.

title: USTA Billie Jean King Girls’ 18s and 16s National Championships
description: Each year, the USTA Billie Jean King Girls’ 18s and 16s National Championships in California becomes the epicenter of junior girls’ tennis in the United States. Nearly 400 of the nation’s most talented young athletes compete for the prestigious title of National Champion, making this event a key milestone in the journey of future tennis stars. Sanctioned by the USTA, the tournament is recognized as the premier hard-court competition for American girls, offering an exciting showcase of skill, determination, and sportsmanship. Spectators can witness the next generation of champions as they battle for national recognition on the courts where legends have been made.

title: Scapin
description: Scapin is a modern adaptation of Molière's classic farce, reimagined by Bill Irwin and Mark O'Donnell. The play features the crafty servant Scapin, who uses outrageous schemes and disguises to help young lovers overcome their miserly fathers. It combines physical comedy and sharp wit in a theatrical production full of humor and surprises.

title: Hell's Kitchen
description: Hell's Kitchen is a new musical by Alicia Keys about a 17-year-old girl named Ali who searches for freedom, passion, and her place in the world. The story is set in New York City and explores themes of self-discovery, mother-daughter relationships, and community. The production features music by Alicia Keys and is directed by Michael Greif with choreography by Camille A. Brown.

title: The Family Album
description: The Family Album is a world-premiere musical that follows singer-songwriter Mia Bing as she confronts her past and family secrets while striving to break through in the music industry. The musical features a soulful power-pop score by MILCK and AG and is directed by Jess McLeod. It explores themes of healing, connection, and reclaiming one's voice for change.

title: Live Model Drawing
description: Live Model Drawing invites you to develop your figure drawing skills by observing a live, clothed model in the SDMA Museum Art Studio. Drawing materials are provided, or you can bring your own, but oil paints and solvents are not allowed. The event operates on a pay-what-you-wish basis and requires an RSVP due to limited registration.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone in Concert
description: Discover the magic of Harry Potter's first year at wizarding school with a live orchestral performance of John Williams' score. The San Diego Symphony Orchestra brings the film to life at The Rady Shell at Jacobs Park. Experience an evening where music and cinema combine to enchant audiences.

title: Sean Jones, Billy Childs, and Ben Williams
description: Three celebrated jazz artists - Sean Jones on trumpet, Billy Childs on piano, and Ben Williams on bass - come together for a special concert. Billy Childs and Ben Williams are familiar to Athenaeum audiences, while Sean Jones makes his debut at this venue. The performance takes place in person at the Athenaeum Music and Arts Library with seating on a first-come, first-served basis.

title: PawPaw Rod Picture Day Tour
description: PawPaw Rod is performing as part of the Picture Day Tour at SOMA San Diego. The event features general admission with standing room only and is open to all ages. Craft beer will be available, and a clear bag policy is enforced for attendees.

title: Chula Vista HarborFest
description: Chula Vista HarborFest makes its highly anticipated return to the Chula Vista bayfront, bringing together the community for a refreshed celebration of maritime culture and summer fun. Set against the scenic backdrop of Bayside Park, this event features live entertainment and a variety of family-friendly activities that highlight the spirit of South Bay. HarborFest is known for uniting locals and visitors alike in a festive atmosphere that showcases the best of waterfront living. Experience the excitement as this beloved tradition sails back into the heart of Chula Vista.

title: Classic Journey Tribute
description: Classic Journey Tribute is a concert event featuring a tribute to the band Journey. The performance includes lead vocals by Chad Smith and musicians who pay close attention to detail to recreate the iconic anthems and ballads of Journey's influential era. The event offers a unique concert and party experience celebrating classic rock music.

title: Jeff Goldblum and The Mildred Snitzer Orchestra with San Diego Symphony Orchestra
description: Jeff Goldblum brings his Mildred Snitzer Orchestra to perform contemporary jazz and American Songbook standards alongside the San Diego Symphony Orchestra. The concert is conducted by Stuart Chafetz and features music from Goldblum's acclaimed albums. Experience a blend of classic jazz with a modern twist at the Rady Shell.

title: Super Girl Surf Festival
description: Super Girl Surf Festival in San Diego, California, is the world’s largest women’s surf competition and music festival, celebrating female athletes and creators since 2007. This free event brings together elite competitors in World Surf League surfing, skateboarding, beach volleyball, soccer, and BMX, all set against a lively beachside atmosphere. Attendees can enjoy live music, inspiring leadership panels, fitness classes, and a marketplace featuring women-owned businesses. The festival is a dynamic showcase of athleticism, empowerment, and community, drawing thousands each year to support the next generation of female talent.

title: Taste of Encinitas
description: Taste of Encinitas in San Diego, California, invites food enthusiasts to stroll through downtown Encinitas and sample signature bites from a variety of local restaurants, cafes, and eateries. This celebrated event highlights the creativity and diversity of the area's culinary scene, offering everything from savory dishes to sweet treats. Attendees can enjoy the unique coastal charm of Encinitas while discovering new flavors and supporting beloved local establishments. It's a must-attend experience for anyone eager to explore the tastes that make this community special.

title: The Breeders
description: The Breeders will perform a concert at The Sound in Del Mar, California. The event features general admission tickets priced at $55, with doors opening at 7:00 PM and the show starting at 8:00 PM. This show is presented by Belly Up but takes place at The Sound venue.

title: ZAYN
description: ZAYN is embarking on The Konnakol Tour, his largest solo tour to date, marking his first time headlining arenas and stadiums across multiple continents. The tour includes 31 dates starting in May 2026 and concluding in November 2026. This tour supports his fifth studio album, KONNAKOL, which is set to be released in April 2026.

title: Cajon Cruise
description: Cajon Cruise in El Cajon, California, transforms Main Street into a bustling hub for car lovers and families, featuring an impressive lineup of classic and modern vehicles. Attendees can stroll among beautifully restored cars, enjoy live music, and sample local food offerings, all while soaking in the lively downtown atmosphere. This beloved tradition brings the community together each week, offering a unique blend of nostalgia and excitement for all ages. Whether you're a dedicated car enthusiast or just looking for a fun evening out, Cajon Cruise is a must-see event in San Diego County.

title: Tori Amos
description: Tori Amos is an award-winning American singer, songwriter, pianist, and composer. Known for her piano skills and mezzo-soprano vocals, Amos is a classically trained musician who has revitalized the piano's role in rock and roll.

title: Playwright’s Saloon
description: Playwright’s Saloon is a monthly staged reading series at Trinity Theatre Company that highlights bold new works and emerging voices. Each event features one-night-only performances directed by Tim West, bringing together actors, playwrights, and audiences in an intimate setting. You’ll find fresh stories and lively conversations that explore original plays and timeless themes.

title: Theresa Caputo Live
description: Theresa Caputo Live is a live event featuring Theresa Caputo, known as the Long Island Medium. She shares personal life stories, humor, and messages from those who have passed on, providing comfort and healing to her audience. The event highlights her gift of communication with the deceased and reassures attendees that their loved ones remain with them differently.

title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl in Concert
description: Experience the San Diego Symphony Orchestra performing the score of Disney’s Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl live to the film. Conducted by Larry Loh, the concert features music by Klaus Badelt and Hans Zimmer, bringing the swashbuckling adventure to life. The event takes place at The Rady Shell at Jacobs Park, offering a unique blend of film and live orchestral music.

title: SummerFest
description: SummerFest in San Diego, California, transforms The Conrad Prebys Performing Arts Center into a hub of musical excitement, featuring over 100 acclaimed musicians from around the world. Audiences can experience a dynamic mix of concerts, free community events, and innovative collaborations, all curated by Music Director Inon Barnatan. With performances ranging from classical masterpieces to intimate jazz sessions and bold premieres, SummerFest offers a unique celebration of music’s evolution and enduring impact. This renowned festival invites music lovers to immerse themselves in unforgettable artistry and creative exploration.

title: Led Zepagain: A Tribute to Led Zeppelin
description: Led Zepagain is a hard rock band recognized as one of Southern California's top tribute acts to Led Zeppelin. With over 30 years of performing experience, they have amassed more than a million downloads on iTunes and played at the Led Zeppelin Reunion Concert in 2007. The band was also named among the World’s Greatest Tribute Bands by AXS TV in 2014.

title: Ramona Rodeo
description: The Ramona Rodeo in San Diego, California, is a beloved annual event that celebrates Western traditions with exciting rodeo competitions and lively entertainment. It draws locals and visitors alike for a weekend of family-friendly fun. Attendees can experience the thrill of classic rodeo events while enjoying music, food, and activities for all ages. This gathering is a true showcase of community spirit and the enduring legacy of the region’s ranching heritage.

title: Tchaikovsky Spectacular
description: An audience favorite returns to The Rady Shell at Jacobs Park with an evening devoted to the passionate, melodic genius of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky. Conductor Enluis Montes Olivar leads the San Diego Symphony in a thrilling program featuring the exuberant Capriccio italien, the sweeping Piano Concerto No. 1 with pianist Joyce Yang, the dramatic tone poem Francesca da Rimini, and the crowd-pleasing 1812 Overture. The night concludes with spectacular pyrotechnics illuminating the bay, amplifying the excitement of this celebration of Tchaikovsky’s music.

title: Roger Clyne and The Peacemakers
description: Roger Clyne and The Peacemakers are a Southwest-based band known for their witty lyrics and dynamic live performances. They have released multiple studio albums independently and maintain a loyal fan base, highlighted by their annual Circus Mexicus music festival. The band continues to tour and produce music, celebrating a long career that began with The Refreshments.

title: Arsenic and Old Lace
description: Arsenic and Old Lace is a classic dark comedy by Joseph Kesselring about two sweet spinster aunts who secretly poison lonely old gentlemen with elderberry wine laced with arsenic. The story follows their nephew Mortimer as he uncovers the macabre family secret amid his whirlwind engagement. The farce escalates with the involvement of a brother channeling Teddy Roosevelt and a criminal resembling Boris Karloff, leading to chaotic and humorous situations.

title: Begin Again
description: Begin Again is a new musical inspired by the Academy Award–nominated film written and directed by John Carney. The story follows Gretta, a heartbroken songwriter, and Dan, a burnt-out record producer, whose chance meeting sparks a transformative collaboration. Set in New York City, the musical explores themes of passion, purpose, and the courage to start over with music by Pat Monahan of Train.

title: J. Cole
description: J. Cole is performing a concert at Viejas Arena. The event is scheduled to start at 8:00 pm with doors opening at 7:00 pm. The venue enforces a clear bag policy and is cashless.

title: Ringling Bros. and Barnum and Bailey Circus: The Greatest Show On Earth
description: The Ringling Bros. and Barnum and Bailey Circus brings its iconic performances to San Diego with dazzling acts that captivate audiences of all ages. You will find a mix of jaw-dropping stunts, colorful costumes, and unforgettable moments that celebrate a time-honored tradition. This event promises to leave you amazed and entertained throughout its run.

title: Sub Urban
description: Sub Urban is performing live at SOMA San Diego with their show The Bell Tolls. The event offers general admission standing room and welcomes all ages, with craft beer available. You'll find a clear bag policy in place to ensure smooth entry.

title: W.A.S.P.
description: W.A.S.P. will perform a concert titled "1984 TO HEADLESS". The event is scheduled to take place at The Magnolia in El Cajon, California. Doors open at 7 PM with the show starting at 8 PM, and the event is open to all ages.

title: Taste of Gaslamp
description: Taste of Gaslamp in San Diego, California, invites food lovers to explore the historic Gaslamp Quarter through a self-guided culinary tour. With over 20 local restaurants participating, guests can sample signature small bites at each stop, showcasing the diverse flavors of the area. This long-standing tradition, celebrated for more than 30 years, offers a unique way to experience the heart of San Diego’s dining scene. Whether you’re a local or a visitor, it’s a delicious adventure through one of the city’s most iconic neighborhoods.

title: Coronado Mainstreet Garden Party
description: Coronado MainStreet’s Garden Party invites guests to enjoy an afternoon of live music, gourmet tastings from local chefs, and a lively silent auction, all set within the historic Stephens-Terry Estate in Coronado, California. Attendees can explore the grand rooms and lush 1920s gardens of this Roaring '20s mansion, rarely open to the public. The event supports the care of Coronado’s 16 Orange Avenue Median Gardens, blending community spirit with a unique opportunity to experience one of the city’s most storied estates.

title: FNGRS CRSSD: JERRO
description: FNGRS CRSSD presents JERRO at Quartyard on September 12, 2026. The event is for guests aged 21 and over, with doors opening at 4:00 PM. It’s a chance to enjoy music in a lively outdoor venue located in downtown San Diego.

title: Ken Whalen Surf Challenge
description: The Ken Whalen Surf Challenge in San Diego, California, celebrates Ken’s passion for surfing, family, and the beach by inviting kids of all abilities—including adaptive surfers and children from Rady Children’s Hospital—to enjoy a day of friendly surf competition and beach fun. Designed especially for beginner and intermediate surfers, the event emphasizes enjoyment and community over competition, encouraging young participants to build confidence and deepen their love for the ocean. Families and friends gather to support the surfers, creating a welcoming and inclusive atmosphere that honors Ken’s legacy.

title: The Phantom of the Opera
description: The Phantom of the Opera is a revitalized new production of Andrew Lloyd Webber's legendary musical presented by Cameron Mackintosh. It tells the story of a disfigured musical genius known as The Phantom who haunts the Paris Opera House and becomes obsessed with a young soprano named Christine.

title: Johnny Blue Skies and The Dark Clouds
description: Johnny Blue Skies and the Dark Clouds will be performing at Viejas Arena on Sunday, September 13, 2026. Doors open at 7:00 pm with the show starting at 8:00 pm. The venue enforces a clear bag policy and is cashless, so plan accordingly for your visit.

title: Rock of Ages
description: Rock of Ages is set in late 1980s Hollywood and follows aspiring rock star Drew and small-town girl Sherri as they navigate the challenges of fame and love. The story centers on their fight to save the iconic Sunset Strip from being turned into a strip mall by developers. The musical features hit songs from bands like Styx, Journey, Bon Jovi, and Whitesnake.

title: Meltt
description: Meltt is a Vancouver indie-pop quartet releasing their third album, Pathways, which explores new musical directions while maintaining their signature warm sound. The album reflects the band members' experiences as they approach their 30s, dealing with themes like relationships, loss, and navigating modern life. The event includes food by El Comal and welcomes all ages, with doors opening at 6 pm.

title: Old Town San Diego Fiestas Patrias
description: Celebrate Mexican Independence Day at Old Town San Diego State Historic Park, where the rich heritage of Mexico and California comes alive. Enjoy hands-on traditional crafts and watch living history demonstrations that showcase the region’s diverse cultural traditions. This festive event invites visitors of all ages to immerse themselves in music, art, and the flavors of Mexican culture, making it a memorable experience for families and history enthusiasts alike.

title: Culture and Cocktails: 1926
description: Culture and Cocktails is a signature event celebrating the San Diego Museum of Art's Centennial year. Inspired by the 1920s, the event features an immersive experience with jazz, glamour, and artistic revolution across the museum's sculpture promenade and galleries. Guests can enjoy an indoor–outdoor atmosphere honoring the museum's 100 years of creativity and community.

title: Peter Hook and The Light
description: Peter Hook and The Light are performing as part of their North American Tour 2026. The event is scheduled to take place at The Sound venue located at the Del Mar Fairgrounds. Tickets are available for general admission with options for advanced purchase and day-of-show pricing.

title: Killers of Kill Tony
description: Regulars and fan favorites from the live podcast "Kill Tony" bring their standup show on the road with "Killers of Kill Tony." The show features comedians who have appeared on the original podcast performing longer stand-up sets in one night. The lineup includes David Lucas, Hans Kim, Martin Phillips, and Dedrick Flynn, though it is subject to change.

title: Earth, Wind, and Fire
description: Earth, Wind, and Fire is a legendary music group formed in 1969 by Maurice White. They have achieved significant success with eight number one hits, over 100 million albums sold worldwide, and multiple awards, including nine GRAMMY Awards and induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. The group continues to perform and inspire audiences with its timeless music.

title: Chelsea Handler
description: Chelsea Handler is a comedian, television host, and seven-time New York Times best-selling author known for her humor and candor. She has hosted several shows, including Chelsea Lately and Chelsea on Netflix, and has released multiple comedy specials and books. This event is a stand-up comedy performance as part of her The High and Mighty Tour.

title: Carin León
description: Carin León is a regional Mexican music artist from Hermosillo, Sonora, Mexico. He began releasing music with a series of live albums starting in 2018 and released his debut studio album independently in 2019. León gained wider recognition in 2022 with a hit collaboration and has since performed at major venues and festivals, including the Grand Ole Opry and Coachella.

title: Slow Magic
description: Slow Magic presents a rich blend of electronic pop with his latest project, Float, which explores a range of moods and genres. The album features collaborations with various artists and introduces live drums, marking a new creative phase. His upcoming plans include releasing a new album called Emotion Engine in the summer of 2026.

title: Topdog/Underdog
description: Pulitzer Prize winner Suzan-Lori Parks's play Topdog/Underdog returns in an intimate staging directed by Steve H. Broadnax III. The story follows brothers Lincoln and Booth as they navigate survival through a street con game, testing their bond amid rivalry and the elusive American Dream. Expect a mix of humor, provocation, and emotional intensity in this modern classic.

title: Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Live Glow N Fire
description: Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Live Glow N Fire brings the thrilling world of monster trucks to life with glowing, fire-breathing performances and daring stunts. You’ll experience high-energy action that captivates both kids and adults alike. The event creates a colorful spectacle that makes for an exciting family outing.

title: The Poway Rodeo
description: The Poway Rodeo in San Diego, California, is a beloved tradition that has brought the community together for over 50 years. This event features thrilling rodeo competitions, showcases skilled riders, and celebrates the region’s rich Western heritage. Families and friends gather to enjoy exciting performances, community spirit, and a welcoming atmosphere for all ages. With opportunities for kids, recognition of dedicated volunteers, and strong support from local businesses, the Poway Rodeo is a must-attend celebration of tradition and camaraderie.

title: Brincos Dieras
description: Brincos Dieras returns with the El Desmadre Continua Tour, bringing his irreverent clown comedy to the stage. After a successful 30th anniversary tour across Mexico, the US, and Canada, he promises a show full of direct, unfiltered humor and energy. Expect plenty of laughs and surprises as he celebrates his career and connection with the audience.

title: Hiss Golden Messenger
description: Hiss Golden Messenger will perform as part of the I'm People Tour. The event features MC Taylor playing songs from his celebrated catalog, including the album Bad Debt. A pre-show VIP experience is available, offering exclusive access and merchandise.

title: Jack White
description: Jack White is a celebrated rock singer, songwriter, musician, and producer known for his work with The White Stripes and as a solo artist. He has won twelve Grammy awards and produced several chart-topping albums. Some of his popular singles include "Lazaretto," "Love is Blindness," and "Another Way to Die."

title: Rancho Bernardo's Favorite Beer-Wine-Spirits and Fun Festival
description: The Rancho BEERnardo Festival in San Diego, California, is a lively outdoor celebration for adults, featuring unlimited tastings from more than 35 acclaimed breweries, local wineries, and craft distilleries. Hosted at Webb Park by the Rancho Bernardo Sunrise Rotary Club, the event offers live music, a variety of food vendors, and entertaining games, creating a welcoming community gathering. Attendees can explore a wide range of flavors while enjoying the festive atmosphere and supporting local causes. This annual festival has become a favorite for those looking to experience the best in regional drinks and fun.

title: Pacific Beachfest
description: Pacific Beachfest in San Diego, California, is a lively, free festival that brings the community together along the scenic Pacific Beach boardwalk. Drawing up to 50,000 visitors each year, the event features a blend of live music, local food vendors, and family-friendly activities, all set against the backdrop of the ocean. Spanning the stretch between Felspar Street and Thomas Street, it’s a celebration of Southern California’s beach culture and laid-back lifestyle. Whether you’re a local or a visitor, Pacific Beachfest offers a fun-filled day by the sea for all ages.

title: Payare Leads Strauss A Hero's Life
description: The 2026-2027 season opens with Rafael Payare conducting the San Diego Symphony in a concert celebrating the power of human imagination. The program features Sofia Gubaidulina’s Fairytale Poem, Mozart’s dramatic Piano Concerto No. 24 with pianist Yefim Bronfman, and Richard Strauss’s theatrical tone poem A Hero's Life. Experience a blend of storytelling and musical grandeur that has inspired generations of composers and listeners alike.

title: La Mesa Oktoberfest
description: La Mesa Oktoberfest in La Mesa, CA, USA, brings the spirit of Bavaria to San Diego with lively celebrations for all ages. This beloved event features traditional German music, delicious food, and family-friendly activities, creating a festive atmosphere in the heart of the community. Attendees can enjoy authentic brews, artisan vendors, and interactive games, making it a memorable gathering for friends and families alike. Experience a taste of German culture and join in the fun at one of Southern California’s most cherished Oktoberfest celebrations.

title: Oh, Mary
description: Oh, Mary is a dark comedy about a miserable, suffocated Mary Todd Lincoln in the weeks leading up to Abraham Lincoln’s assassination. The 80-minute one-act play explores themes of unrequited yearning, alcoholism, and suppressed desires through the perspective of playwright Cole Escola. The play has received critical acclaim, including two Tony Awards, and was a finalist for the Pulitzer Prize for Drama.

title: Oktoberfest in El Cajon
description: Experience the lively spirit of Oktoberfest in El Cajon, San Diego’s most traditional celebration of German culture, hosted by the German American Societies. Enjoy authentic German beers on tap, classic food and desserts, and the festive sounds of a live OomPah band. The event features folk dancers, a bustling vendor area, a dedicated kids’ zone, and fun contests and raffles, making it a welcoming festival for all ages. Join the community for a memorable blend of music, food, and family-friendly entertainment.

title: Del Mar Wine and Food Festival
description: Set against the stunning backdrop of Surf Sports Park in Del Mar, the Del Mar Wine and Food Festival is San Diego’s signature celebration of culinary excellence by the sea. This festival brings together acclaimed chefs, beloved local eateries, renowned winemakers, and craft brewers for a weekend of unforgettable tastings and coastal flair. Guests can explore a diverse array of Southern California flavors, from inventive Baja-inspired dishes to expertly curated wines and brews. It’s a must-attend event for food lovers eager to experience the best of the region’s food, drink, and laid-back culture.

title: A Taste of Coronado
description: A Taste of Coronado in Coronado, California, invites guests to explore the island’s culinary scene with tastings from top local restaurants, bars, and shops. This self-guided event draws over 800 attendees each year, offering an evening filled with delicious food, drinks, and lively socializing. Celebrated for over a decade, it highlights the talents of local chefs and bartenders while supporting small businesses and the community. It’s a must-attend experience for food lovers looking to discover the best of Coronado.

title: Bassem Youssef Belly of the Beast Tour
description: Bassem Youssef, known for hosting the Middle East's first political satire show Al Bernameg, is performing his Belly of the Beast Tour. The event features his one-man stand-up comedy show, reflecting his global influence and success in political satire and entertainment. The show is scheduled for October 9, 2026, at the Balboa Theatre in San Diego.

title: Carmel Valley Trail Races
description: The Carmel Valley Trail Race in San Diego, California, is the original trail running event of the Endurance Race Series and a favorite season opener for local runners. Participants experience scenic single-track trails and challenging dirt roads through the stunning Gonzales Canyon Open Space, with the infamous "Puke Hill" awaiting those in the 10 Mile and 10K distances. The course offers a flat start and finish at Solana Ranch Park, with all elevation gains packed into the middle miles, while 5K runners enjoy a flatter route. With a capped field of 300 runners, this event is known to sell out quickly, making it a must for trail enthusiasts looking for a memorable and competitive race.

title: Bikes and Beers San Diego
description: Bikes and Beers San Diego invites cyclists of all levels to enjoy a scenic ride through San Diego, starting and finishing at the renowned AleSmith Brewing Company. Participants can choose from 15, 30, or 45-mile routes, all fully supported with marked paths, rest stops, and SAG vehicles. After the ride, the celebration continues with a lively beer festival featuring two complimentary craft beers, live music, food trucks, games, and a charity raffle benefiting local cycling organizations. This event blends the love of cycling, craft beer, and community support for an unforgettable experience.

title: Edgardo Nuñez and Kane Rodriguez
description: Edgardo Nuñez is a leading figure in Regional Mexican music, known for blending traditional sounds with urban styles. Kane Rodriguez brings a fresh voice from Houston, mixing cumbia, banda, and norteño with modern influences. Together, they offer a dynamic concert experience that highlights the evolving landscape of Mexican regional music.

title: San Diego Italian Film Festival
description: The San Diego Italian Film Festival celebrates Italian cinema, art, and culture with a dynamic lineup of contemporary and classic films. Attendees can enjoy engaging discussions with visiting Italian filmmakers, participate in the Ristretto short film competition, and experience lively food-focused gatherings. The festival is dedicated to building community and exploring Italian identity through film and cultural events. With year-round programming, it offers a unique opportunity to connect with Italy’s cinematic heritage in Southern California.

title: Ocean Beach Oktoberfest
description: Ocean Beach Oktoberfest in San Diego, California, brings together the lively spirit of Oktoberfest with the laid-back charm of the coast. Hosted by the Ocean Beach MainStreet Association, this event features a festive beer garden overlooking the Pacific Ocean, live music, and local food vendors. Attendees are encouraged to explore the unique shops, restaurants, and attractions of Ocean Beach throughout the weekend. It's a fun-filled celebration that captures the essence of the community and the beauty of the seaside setting.

title: Khachaturian’s Exuberant Violin Concerto
description: Experience the vibrant energy of Khachaturian’s Violin Concerto performed by violinist Sergey Khachatryan under the baton of Rafael Payare. The program also features Bruckner’s majestic Symphony No. 9, inspired by the Austrian Alps. Both works evoke the grandeur of mountainous landscapes through rich melodies and powerful orchestration.

title: Jonathan Van Ness
description: Jonathan Van Ness is an Emmy-winning television personality, author, podcaster, comedian, and celebrity hairstylist. The Hot and Healed Comedy Tour 2026 is a new show featuring unfiltered comedy and a celebration of joy, showcasing sides of Jonathan Van Ness not previously seen. The tour follows two successful worldwide comedy tours and will visit cities across the US, Canada, and abroad.

title: The Living Tombstone
description: The Living Tombstone is performing as part of The Multiplayer Tour. The event is scheduled to take place on Saturday, October 10, with a start time of 7 pm on the mainstage. The concert is all ages with general admission standing room only and craft beer available.

title: The Rush Tribute Project
description: The Rush Tribute Project is a live concert event featuring a tribute to the band Rush. The event is scheduled to take place at The Magnolia in El Cajon, California. Doors open at 6:30 PM with the show starting at 7:30 PM, and the event welcomes all ages.

title: La Jolla Art and Wine Festival
description: The La Jolla Art and Wine Festival is a sophisticated celebration of fine art, exquisite wines, and craft beer. Stroll through scenic La Jolla Village while exploring works from talented artists, enjoying tastings, and taking in live entertainment. This elegant event is a perfect blend of culture and relaxation.

title: The Rocky Horror Picture Show feat. Patricia Quinn
description: The Rocky Horror Picture Show is a cult classic film known for its unique blend of horror, comedy, and musical elements. On October 11, 2026, you can experience a live performance by the local Shadow Cast acting out scenes on stage while the full film plays behind them. The event also includes a chance to meet stars from the movie and participate in a costume contest.

title: Mission Bay Triathlon
description: The XTERRA WETSUITS Mission Bay Triathlon in San Diego, California, invites athletes of all levels to compete in a variety of multisport events, including triathlon, duathlon, aquabike, aquathlon, and a 5K run. Set against the scenic backdrop of Mission Bay and Fiesta Island, participants can choose from international, sprint, mini, and kids’ distances. As the USAT Sprint and Olympic Multisport Championship, this event draws a diverse field and offers a welcoming atmosphere for both seasoned competitors and newcomers. Experience the excitement and community spirit that has made this race a staple in the San Diego athletic calendar for decades.

title: A Black-billed Cuckoo
description: A Black-billed Cuckoo is a world-premiere play by Mat Smart, directed by Shelley Butler. The play explores a close-knit birding community in Brooklyn's Prospect Park over 24 hours, focusing on the elusive black-billed cuckoo and the dynamics among birders who see the rare bird and those who do not. It is a quiet comedy about healing, wonder, and moving on after missing out.

title: Daniel Sloss
description: Daniel Sloss, Scotland's comedy superstar, presents his 13th solo show titled BITTER. The show is part of a worldwide tour culminating in a headlining debut at London's Wembley Arena. Daniel has performed standup for over half of his 35 years, with tours spanning 55 countries and multiple sold-out runs.

title: Hauntfest
description: Hauntfest transforms Downtown El Cajon, San Diego, into a lively Halloween celebration perfect for families of all ages. Attendees can enjoy live music, creative costume contests, thrilling carnival rides, and a unique haunted car show. The event also features a diverse selection of local vendors offering delicious food, handmade crafts, and interactive games. With its festive atmosphere and wide range of activities, Hauntfest is a must-visit for anyone looking to experience the spirit of Halloween in the community.

title: Spain Through French Glasses: Ravel and Debussy
description: French conductor Ludovic Morlot leads a program featuring luminous works by Debussy, Ravel, Poulenc, and a contemporary trombone concerto by Jimmy López. The concert explores themes of dance rhythms, nocturnal magic, and vibrant colors, with performances by trombonist Jörgen van Rijen. Experience a blend of impressionist beauty and modern brilliance in this thoughtfully curated program.

title: D6 Fall Festival
description: The D6 Fall Festival in San Diego is a lively, free event designed for families and community members of all ages. Hosted at the Verne Goodwin Mira Mesa Senior Center, the festival features food trucks, craft activities, a movie in the park, Trunk-Or-Treat, and pumpkin decorating. Presented by the Alliance for Quality Education, the D6 Night Market Team, and the Mira Mesa Senior Center, the event is supported by the City of San Diego Parks and Recreation Department. Attendees can look forward to a festive atmosphere filled with fun, creativity, and opportunities to connect with neighbors.

title: Dusty Slay
description: Dusty Slay brings his down-to-earth comedy rooted in his trailer park upbringing and Southern charm. His performances blend humor about everyday life with reflections on his unique background and career journey. You’ll find a mix of classic country spirit and relatable stories delivered with a warm, genuine style.

title: Stevie Nicks Illusion: A Tribute to Fleetwood Mac and Stevie Nicks
description: Stevie Nicks Illusion is a tribute band that authentically recreates the sound and performance of Fleetwood Mac and Stevie Nicks. The band features world-class musicianship and captures the essence of the original members through vocals and instrumentation. Their shows are intimate and engaging, offering a magical shared musical experience without the use of backing tracks.

title: Celebrate the Craft
description: Celebrate the Craft brings together top chefs, food artisans, winemakers, and craft brewers to highlight the best of California’s local ingredients and culinary creativity. Guests can sample innovative dishes and beverages while exploring a curated marketplace featuring handmade pottery, jewelry, hats, and boots from talented makers and artists. The event also supports the San Diego Food Bank, helping to fight hunger through food rescue initiatives. Experience a unique gathering that celebrates the region’s agricultural abundance and creative spirit.

title: Iron and Wine
description: Iron and Wine is performing a concert at The Magnolia in El Cajon, California. The event is scheduled for the evening, with doors opening at 7 PM and the show starting at 8 PM. The concert is open to all ages, and ticket prices vary by seating section.

title: Reefer Madness O.B.S.
description: Reefer Madness: O.B.S. is a raucous musical comedy inspired by the original 1936 film of the same name. The show takes a tongue-in-cheek look at the hysteria caused when clean-cut kids fall prey to marijuana, leading them on a hysterical downward spiral filled with evil jazz music, sex, and violence.

title: Weatherday
description: Weatherday returns with Hornet Disaster, a follow-up to their 2019 debut and a record full of energetic, experimental sounds. The album weaves diverse influences and instruments into a dynamic collection of nineteen songs. You’ll find the event welcoming all ages with food available from El Comal and doors opening at 6 pm.

title: Weezer
description: Fans of alternative rock will find a lot to enjoy at this Weezer concert. The show includes performances by The Shins and Silversun Pickups, adding to the evening's appeal. Doors open early, giving you time to settle in before the music starts.

title: Rigoletto
description: Rigoletto is a gripping opera about a court jester whose life is upended by a curse he unleashes. The story unfolds with powerful arias and a dramatic tale of betrayal, sacrifice, and revenge. You'll find yourself captivated by Verdi's masterful composition and the emotional depth of the characters.

title: Santee Lakes Spooktacular and Trunk-or-Treat
description: Santee Lakes Spooktacular and Trunk-or-Treat in San Diego, California, offers a festive Halloween experience for families, featuring a creative Trunk-or-Treat trail where local vendors hand out treats. Guests can enjoy interactive attractions like a donut walk, lively music from a DJ, and encounters with creepy critters. Food trucks provide a variety of tasty options, making it easy to spend the evening at the lakes. The event is free to attend, with only a standard parking fee, making it an accessible and fun way to celebrate the season.

title: America
description: The rock band America was formed in London by the sons of US Air Force personnel stationed there in 1970. Their debut album, "America," came out that same year, followed by "Homecoming" in 1972. You'll find their classic rock sound still resonates with fans at this event.

title: Meet The Strings: Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star
description: Meet The Strings: Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star is a gentle, sensory-friendly concert designed for babies, toddlers, and preschoolers. The 25-minute performance features violins, violas, cellos, and bass, creating a cozy atmosphere where little ones can listen, move, and sing along. Special accommodations like a quiet room and sensory kits help support families during the experience.

title: Oceanside Dia de los Muertos Festival
description: The Oceanside Dia de los Muertos Festival in San Diego, California, celebrates the rich traditions of honoring loved ones with colorful altars, live music, and traditional dance. Held for over 20 years, this beloved community event brings together families, artists, and local vendors along Pier View Way to share Mexican culture and heritage. Attendees can enjoy delicious food, browse artisan crafts, and participate in interactive activities that highlight the meaning and artistry of Dia de los Muertos. The festival is a unique opportunity to experience authentic cultural expressions and connect with the Oceanside community.

title: Gorillaz
description: Gorillaz will perform at Pechanga Arena San Diego on October 25, 2026, as part of their North American Tour Fall 2026. The tour supports their new album The Mountain, and includes 22 arena dates across the U.S. and Canada. The event is produced by Live Nation and features Gorillaz co-creators Damon Albarn and Jamie Hewlett, with Albarn joined by the live band and special guests.

title: San Diego Triathlon Challenge (SDTC)
description: The San Diego Triathlon Challenge at La Jolla Cove, San Diego, brings together athletes of all abilities for a weekend of inclusive competition and community. Hosted by the Challenged Athletes Foundation, this flagship event features endurance races, adaptive sports clinics, and opportunities for participants with physical disabilities to compete alongside able-bodied athletes. The event fosters camaraderie, celebrates perseverance, and raises vital funds to support adaptive sports programs. Whether you’re an athlete, supporter, or spectator, the San Diego Triathlon Challenge offers an inspiring experience in a stunning coastal setting.

title: USA Ultimate National Championships
description: The USA Ultimate National Championships bring together the nation’s top ultimate frisbee teams for an electrifying showdown at Surf Sports Park in San Diego, California. After months of intense qualifying tournaments, elite athletes from across the country compete for national titles in Men’s, Women’s, and Mixed divisions, all while upholding the sport’s unique Spirit of the Game. Spectators can expect high-level athleticism, strategic play, and a celebration of ultimate’s inclusive community. This event is a must-see for sports fans and anyone interested in witnessing the best of American ultimate frisbee.

title: Doja Cat
description: Doja Cat will perform a concert at Viejas Arena. The event features doors opening at 6:30 pm and a scheduled start time of 7:30 pm. It is a single evening music event held in San Diego.

title: Jim Hensons Labyrinth: In Concert 40th Anniversary
description: Jim Henson's Labyrinth: In Concert 40th Anniversary is a live concert event celebrating the 40th anniversary of the film Labyrinth. The event features a performance of the film's music in concert. It is an all-ages event with doors opening at 7 PM and the show starting at 8 PM.

title: Pier Pressure San Diego Halloween Cruise: Titanic Masquerade
description: Pier Pressure San Diego Halloween Cruise transforms The Inspiration Yacht into a floating masquerade, drawing over 1,000 costumed guests for an unforgettable night on the water. Recognized as one of the West Coast’s largest Halloween yacht parties, the event features multiple decks with top DJs spinning open format, EDM, and hip-hop. Guests enjoy sweeping views of the San Diego harbor while dancing and mingling across expansive dance floors. This 21+ celebration is a must for those seeking a unique and energetic Halloween experience on the bay.

title: Orchestre Symphonique de Montréal
description: The Orchestre symphonique de Montréal, conducted by Rafael Payare, presents a vibrant program featuring works by Moussa, Tchaikovsky, and Stravinsky. Experience the evocative orchestral meditation Elysium, the passionate Violin Concerto in D Major, and the full ballet The Firebird. This concert offers a rich journey through color, emotion, and storytelling in a single evening.

title: Black Pearl San Diego Halloween Party Cruise
description: Step aboard the California Spirit for the Black Pearl San Diego Halloween Party Cruise, an unforgettable night on the water hosted by VIP Nightlife and San Diego Nightlife. Enjoy three spacious decks, an open bar throughout the cruise, and complimentary gourmet sliders as you take in stunning views of the San Diego skyline and Coronado Bridge. With two DJs spinning top hits across two dance floors and festive party favors, this yacht party delivers a lively Halloween celebration unlike any other in San Diego. Capture endless photo moments and make lasting memories at this top-rated haunted mansion on the water.

title: San Diego Zombie Crawl
description: San Diego Zombie Crawl transforms the Gaslamp Quarter into a thrilling Halloween playground, offering access to over 25 top nightclubs and bars with just one ticket. Guests enjoy complimentary welcome shots, exclusive drink and dining deals, and nonstop entertainment with DJs and dancing throughout the night. Known as the city’s longest-running Halloween club celebration, the event features iconic venues like American Junkie and promises a high-energy experience valued far beyond the ticket price. This is a must-attend for anyone seeking an unforgettable night out in San Diego’s lively nightlife scene.

title: Trick or Treat Symphony
description: A musical Halloween adventure awaits with magic, mystery, and playful orchestral moments at the Jacobs Music Center. Families will explore spooky mountains, glittering ballrooms, and enchanted forests through lively melodies and dances. Before the concert, enjoy crafts, costumes, and trick-or-treat activities that spark creativity and fun for all ages.

title: Día de los Muertos
description: Experience the colorful traditions of Día de los Muertos at SeaWorld San Diego, where families come together to honor and remember loved ones. The park features striking Catrina statues and beautifully decorated ofrendas, creating a festive and meaningful atmosphere. Guests can enjoy authentic Mexican treats such as Pan de Muerto, Tostilocos, and Esquites, along with themed beverages. This celebration blends culture, food, and community, making it a memorable event for all ages.

title: Komen San Diego MORE THAN PINK Walk
description: The Komen San Diego MORE THAN PINK Walk at Balboa Park, San Diego, brings the community together to support the fight against breast cancer. Participants can explore interactive zones focused on research, care, community, and action, visit the “We Remember” tent, and connect with local sponsors. Special activities honor survivors and those living with metastatic breast cancer, including a walk down the Pathway of Hope and a gathering at Hope Village.
