The event concludes with a lively post-walk celebration featuring music, snacks, and a Mascot Dance Off, making it a meaningful and uplifting experience for all ages.

title: The Outsiders
description: The Outsiders is a Tony Award-winning musical adapted from S.E. Hinton's novel and Francis Ford Coppola's film. Set in Tulsa, Oklahoma, in 1967, it tells the story of Ponyboy Curtis and his Greaser friends as they navigate rivalry and self-discovery. The show features a dynamic original score and explores themes of friendship, family, and belonging.

title: Don McLean
description: Don McLean will perform a seated show at Belly Up in Solana Beach. The event features general admission and reserved seating options. It is an all-ages 21 and up event with tickets available in advance and at the door.

title: Silver Strand Half Marathon
description: The Silver Strand Half Marathon in San Diego, California, invites participants to experience a stunning coastal run from Coronado’s Sunset Park to Silver Strand State Beach. With the Pacific Ocean and San Diego Bay as a backdrop, the event features a flat, fast course ideal for runners, walkers, handcyclists, and wheelchair athletes of all levels. Multiple race distances, including a Half Marathon, 10-Miler, 12K, and Veterans Day 5K, ensure there’s something for everyone. Finishers celebrate at a lively beachside party with live music, a beer garden, and unique race swag, all while supporting local charities.

title: Coronado Island Film Festival
description: The Coronado Island Film Festival in San Diego, California, celebrates the intersection of cinematic artistry and innovation, bringing together filmmakers, storytellers, and film lovers in a lively community setting. The festival showcases a diverse lineup of films, from thought-provoking documentaries to imaginative independent features and standout works by local San Diego talent. Attendees enjoy red carpet events, engaging panels, and opportunities to connect with industry leaders, all while soaking in the unique culture and coastal charm of Coronado Island. The festival is a joyful gathering that honors timeless storytelling and the evolving voices shaping the future of cinema.

title: Michael Blaustein
description: Michael Blaustein is a rapidly rising stand-up comedian known for his viral clips that have garnered over 900 million views. He has sold out venues worldwide and co-hosts the popular comedy podcast Stiff Socks. Now, he returns for the final leg of his Taste Me Tour, offering a last chance to see his live set.

title: Outlander in Concert
description: Outlander in Concert is an officially licensed live concert experience created in collaboration with the show's showrunner, Matthew B. Roberts, and composer Bear McCreary. The event features a symphonic performance of the iconic score by Bear McCreary, accompanied by a cinema-sized screen showing the series' most stirring moments. It celebrates the show's heritage, characters, and landscapes, premiering in Scotland and continuing as a love letter to the story that captivated millions worldwide.

title: Teddy Swims
description: Teddy Swims blends soul, R&B, pop, and rock with powerful vocals and emotional delivery. He rose to fame through viral YouTube covers before launching his original music career. His hit "Lose Control" highlights his ability to mix vulnerability with vocal strength.

title: Marisela
description: Marisela, known as "La Dama de Hierro" (The Iron Lady), is a singer who has captivated audiences worldwide with her distinctive voice and heartfelt songs. Her concert features timeless classics and recent hits, celebrating themes of love and heartbreak. The event brings together fans of all ages for an emotional live music experience.

title: Los Tigres Del Norte
description: Los Tigres Del Norte, formed in 1968 in San Jose, California, are widely recognized as the world’s most influential norteño band. With a career spanning more than 50 years, the group has sold over 32 million albums worldwide and earned multiple GRAMMY and Latin GRAMMY Awards. The band is known for socially conscious corridos and storytelling that address themes of immigration, love, and social justice.

title: Kaiser Permanente Thrive Half Marathon and 5K
description: The Kaiser Permanente Thrive Half Marathon and 5K in San Diego, California, invites runners and walkers to experience one of the city’s most scenic courses, winding through the picturesque paths of Mission Bay. This event encourages participants of all ages and abilities to embrace a healthy, active lifestyle while supporting Make-A-Wish San Diego. With its community-focused atmosphere and beautiful waterfront views, the race is a celebration of wellness, giving back, and the spirit of San Diego.

title: Tchaikovsky and Shostakovich: Majesty and Tragedy
description: Two powerful masterworks come together under the baton of Rafael Payare at Jacobs Music Center. Pianist Daniil Trifonov performs Tchaikovsky's Piano Concerto No. 1, while Shostakovich's Symphony No. 10 reflects on the aftermath of Stalin's death with deep emotional resonance. The concert explores themes of personal expression and historical struggle through these iconic compositions.

title: Fleet Week San Diego
description: Attend San Diego Fleet Week for an unforgettable combination of military ceremonies, ship tours, and airshow performances. Hosted by the United States Navy every year, the event features flyovers from the U.S. Marine Corps legendary AV-8 Harrier jets and the U.S. Navy's most sophisticated aircraft. Enjoy the camaraderie of the sailors on board or stand back and relish the spectacle of majestic vessels sailing into the city's harbor.

title: Bluey's Big Play
description: Bluey's Big Play is a theatrical adaptation of the Emmy award-winning children’s television series featuring an original story by Bluey creator Joe Brumm and new music by composer Joff Bush. The show brings the Heelers to life with brilliantly created puppets in their first live theatre performance. The story follows Bluey and Bingo as they try to get their dad off the bean bag for some playtime.

title: Three Days Grace
description: Three Days Grace will perform a concert at Viejas Arena. The event includes supporting acts I Prevail and The Funeral Portrait. Doors open at 5:30 pm with the show starting at 7:00 pm.

title: Voices of Destiny: Liszt’s Concerto and Mahler’s Sixth
description: Two Romantic masterpieces come together as conductor Rafael Payare and pianist Inon Barnatan explore themes of fate and heroism. Liszt’s Piano Concerto No. 1 is a dramatic, operatic work showcasing virtuosic piano technique. Mahler’s Symphony No. 6 expands this struggle into an epic symphony marked by powerful emotions and the famous hammer blows of fate.

title: Concrete and Jerry Garcia
description: Concrete, also known as Cristian Gutierrez, is a multi-talented entertainer known for his work in music, film, social media, and stand-up comedy. Jerry Garcia is a nationally recognized comedian known for his relatable humor and engaging stage presence. Together, they are featured in the That's Not Me Comedy Tour, performing stand-up comedy.

title: Encinitas Holiday Street Fair
description: The Encinitas Holiday Street Fair transforms the heart of Encinitas, San Diego, into a festive celebration just steps from the Pacific Ocean. Hosted by the Encinitas 101 MainStreet Association, this popular event features a lively mix of arts, handmade crafts, antiques, and unique imports, with two stages of live entertainment and a variety of food and drink options. Families can enjoy children’s rides while exploring six blocks of local vendors, making it a favorite tradition for both residents and visitors. With a history dating back to 1989, the fair offers a welcoming atmosphere and a memorable way to kick off the holiday season.

title: Into the Woods
description: Into the Woods is a musical with music and lyrics by Stephen Sondheim and a book by James Lapine. The story intertwines fairy tales such as Cinderella, Little Red Riding Hood, Jack, and a Baker and his Wife on an adventure through the woods where wishes and curses come to life. The production explores what happens after 'happily ever after' with a Tony Award-winning score and witty lyrics.

title: Leonid and Friends
description: Leonid and Friends is a Moscow-based 11-piece tribute band dedicated to the American supergroup Chicago. The band has gained significant popularity with over 250,000 followers on social media and more than 35 million video views. Their performances capture the spirit and musicality of Chicago, and they have expanded their audience beyond Russia through touring.

title: Cristian Castro
description: Cristian Castro, known as "El Gallito Feliz," is a Latin Pop singer with a career starting in the early 1990s. His debut album Agua Nueva was Grammy-nominated and earned multiple awards. He will perform live at Pechanga Arena San Diego on November 27, 2026.

title: Dustin Nickerson
description: Dustin Nickerson is a Seattle native and rising comic currently based in Southern California. He released his debut comedy special, Overwhelmed, in 2020, which is highly rated on Amazon Prime Video. He has appeared on The Tonight Show with Jimmy Fallon, Comedy Central, Netflix, and other platforms, and is known for his jokes about parenting, marriage, and everyday annoyances.

title: Black Mountain Turkey Burner
description: The Black Mountain Turkey Burner Trail Race in San Diego, California, is known as the most technical event in the Endurance Race Series’ Sunshine Series. Runners of all levels can challenge themselves on scenic trails, with the half-marathon featuring steep climbs and rugged terrain, while the 10K and 5K offer less technical but still rewarding routes. Hosted at Black Mountain Community Park for over a decade, this race is capped at 300 participants due to park guidelines, making early registration essential. It’s a popular post-holiday tradition for those looking to burn off their Thanksgiving feast and enjoy the natural beauty of Black Mountain.

title: Big Bad Voodoo Daddy
description: Big Bad Voodoo Daddy presents their annual Wild And Swingin' Holiday Party, featuring a unique take on American swing and jazz holiday music. The event includes performances of holiday classics and original songs from the band's holiday albums. The show is designed as a family-friendly event with a mix of fun and spirited arrangements.

title: GRIM
description: GRIM is a world-premiere musical that explores themes of life and death through the story of the Grim Reaper's daughter, Diana, who must pass a test to take over her father's role. The musical features a score by Petro AP, Scott Hoying, Joey Orton, and Brad Silnutzer, and is directed by Sammi Cannold. It is scheduled to run from October to November 2026 at the Mandell Weiss Theatre.

title: Mariachi Sol de México de José Hernández: A Merry-Achi Christmas
description: Latin Grammy nominees Maestro José Hernández and his acclaimed Mariachi Sol de México return with their annual Christmas holiday tour. The program highlights mariachi favorites alongside beloved Christmas music, including a mariachi-style performance of Tchaikovsky's The Nutcracker Suite. Experience a festive blend of traditional mariachi and holiday spirit in this special concert.

title: Coronado Holiday Parade and Tree Lighting
description: The Coronado Annual Holiday Parade and Tree Lighting is a cherished community celebration that marks the start of the holiday season on Coronado Island, San Diego, California. Drawing around 17,000 attendees, this festive event features a lively parade through the heart of the downtown business district and a magical tree lighting ceremony at Rotary Park. Families and friends gather to enjoy local performances, holiday cheer, and the small-town charm that has made this tradition a highlight for over 50 years. The event is organized by the Coronado Chamber of Commerce in collaboration with the city and Discover Coronado, creating a memorable kickoff to the winter festivities.

title: Little Italy Tree Lighting and Christmas Village
description: The Little Italy Tree Lighting and Christmas Village in San Diego transforms the neighborhood into a festive winter wonderland, with sparkling lights, towering nutcrackers, and kinetic holiday displays lining the streets. Guests can enjoy live music, holiday treats, and a traditional Italian tree lighting ceremony at the iconic Piazza della Famiglia, as well as visit the Christmas Village on India Street for unique gifts and artisan vendors. The event features two beautifully decorated Christmas trees, including the permanent 25-foot tree and the dazzling Aurora tree at Piazza Basilone. Santa makes a special appearance, adding extra magic for families and children celebrating the season.

title: December Nights
description: Experience a family-friendly event that brings San Diegans together to enjoy amazing food, sounds, lights, and attractions during December Nights. The event features choir performances, light displays, Santa Claus, a variety of craft vendors, and the annual tree lighting. Make memories and carry on holiday traditions with hundreds of other visitors while enjoying live entertainment and festive fun.

title: La Jolla Christmas Parade and Holiday Festival
description: The La Jolla Christmas Parade and Holiday Festival in San Diego, California, is a beloved community tradition that has brought holiday cheer to the Village since 1957. Attendees enjoy a classic parade filled with festive floats, local performers, and holiday music, followed by a lively street festival with entertainment for all ages. Hosted near the La Jolla Recreation Center, this free event draws thousands each year, creating a joyful atmosphere that celebrates the spirit of the season. It’s a wonderful way for families and friends to kick off the holidays together in a picturesque coastal setting.

title: Derrick Stroup
description: Derrick Stroup is a stand-up comedian known for his rapid-fire storytelling and high-energy comedy. He has appeared on The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon and released a Netflix special titled Nostalgic. Stroup tours nationally and has worked with well-known comedians while also appearing in film projects.

title: Dixon Lake Trail Runs
description: Experience the thrill of the Dixon Lake Trail Runs in San Diego, California, as you set out from El Caballo Park and traverse the scenic trails of Daley Ranch. Runners tackle challenging elevation gains of 900 to 1300 feet, with the 10-mile course leading to the summit of Stanley Peak for breathtaking 360-degree views. With a capped field of 300 participants, this event offers a welcoming and energetic atmosphere for both seasoned trail runners and newcomers. Discover why these picturesque trails keep athletes returning year after year.

title: Holiday in the Village
description: Holiday in the Village in La Mesa, California, transforms downtown La Mesa Blvd into a festive wonderland filled with holiday shopping, dining, and family-friendly activities. Visitors can browse over 100 vendors offering unique gifts, handcrafted items, and delicious treats, while kids enjoy a special shopping program with affordable options just for them. The Elf Adventure Trail invites families to hunt for hidden elves along the boulevard for a chance to win prizes, adding a playful twist to the holiday experience. With charming local shops, eateries, and seasonal entertainment, this event captures the spirit of the holidays in the heart of La Mesa.

title: Candlelight: Christmas Carols on Strings
description: Candlelight concerts create a unique atmosphere with live string quartet performances of Christmas carols under the warm glow of candlelight. The event takes place at the historic Star Theatre in Oceanside, offering a 60-minute musical experience featuring beloved holiday classics. You can enjoy this intimate setting with assigned seating and accessibility accommodations.

title: Gary Hoey
description: Gary Hoey is a Boston-born guitar player and solo artist who has been touring for over two decades with 20 albums. His Ho Ho Hoey Rockin’ Holiday Tour features holiday music, older hits, and new songs from his latest album, Dust and Bones. The show is family-friendly and includes autograph sessions after performances.

title: Holiday Cabaret
description: Holiday Cabaret is an annual holiday sing-along presented by Coronado Playhouse. The event features performances by CPH alumni and is designed as a family-friendly celebration of the holiday season. It is part of the Concerts and Cabarets Series at the Playhouse.

title: San Diego Bazaar
description: San Diego Bazaar, established in 2025, brings together talented artists, makers, and small businesses from across the region for a lively marketplace experience in San Diego, CA. Visitors can explore a diverse selection of handmade goods and unique creations, all while supporting local entrepreneurs and the community. The event is free to attend and welcomes all ages, making it a perfect outing for families and friends. Discover new favorites and enjoy the creative spirit that defines this growing annual gathering.

title: Lamb's Festival of Christmas: Fargo North of Normal
description: Experience the heartwarming magic of Lamb's Festival of Christmas at Lamb's Players Theatre in Coronado, California, where a diverse group of characters—including a rising star, a real estate mogul, a spirited child, and an octogenarian—find themselves vying for the same dream home just in time for the holidays. This delightful production weaves together comedic twists, touching moments, and beloved seasonal music, creating a joyful celebration for all ages. With its engaging story and festive spirit, the show has become a cherished holiday tradition for audiences in San Diego. Discover why families return year after year to share in the laughter and warmth of this unique theatrical event.

title: A Christmas Story
description: A Christmas Story is a nostalgic musical about nine-year-old Ralphie Parker, who wants an Official Red Ryder Range Model Carbine Action BB Gun for Christmas. Despite warnings that he will shoot his eye out, Ralphie tries to convince everyone, from his mother to Santa Claus, that he needs the gun. The show features showstopping numbers, tap routines, and quirky characters, capturing the spirit of the holiday season.

title: Kids' New Years Eve
description: Kids' New Year's Eve at LEGOLAND California Resort, Carlsbad, offers families a chance to ring in the New Year together with a special celebration designed just for kids. The festivities feature an early "midnight" countdown, allowing little ones to enjoy the excitement without staying up late. With interactive activities, themed entertainment, and a lively atmosphere, this event creates memorable moments for families looking to celebrate in a fun and safe environment. It's a unique way for children and parents to welcome the New Year together at one of San Diego's most iconic attractions.

title: Old Town Trolley’s Holiday Sights and Festive Nights Tour
description: Old Town Trolley’s Holiday Sights and Festive Nights Tour in San Diego invites families and friends to experience the city’s festive spirit from the comfort of a decorated trolley. Guests are treated to cheerful holiday music, candy canes, and interactive sing-alongs with lyric books, making the ride lively and engaging. Knowledgeable guides share fun stories and lead playful games, creating a warm and memorable holiday outing.

title: San Diego Short Film Festival
description: The San Diego Short Film Festival, held at Digital Gym CINEMA in San Diego, California, is an intimate celebration of short-form cinema that brings together filmmakers and film lovers from around the globe. Recognized on IMDb, the festival features a diverse selection of short films, including compelling dramas and imaginative animations. Attendees can experience a curated showcase of creative storytelling and connect with both emerging and established filmmakers. This event offers a unique opportunity to discover new talent and enjoy innovative films in a welcoming, community-focused setting.

title: San Diego MLK 5K Walk and Fun Run
description: Celebrate the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. at the San Diego MLK 5K Walk and Fun Run, an event dedicated to promoting health, unity, and equal opportunity in the community. Participants of all ages and abilities are invited to walk, jog, or run along the scenic Embarcadero, enjoying beautiful waterfront views while supporting causes related to healthcare, education, and workforce development. Bring your family, friends, and even your pets to join in this uplifting experience that encourages a healthy lifestyle and honors Dr. King's dream.

title: San Diego Tet Festival
description: The San Diego Tet Festival at Naval Training Center Park is the largest celebration of the Vietnamese Lunar New Year in San Diego County. This lively three-day event brings together the community with live music, traditional lion dances, cultural performances, and appearances by top Vietnamese artists. Attendees can explore a Cultural Village to experience authentic Vietnamese customs and cuisine, and enjoy the excitement of the Miss Vietnam San Diego pageant. The festival offers a unique opportunity to celebrate heritage and welcome the new year with family-friendly activities and entertainment.

title: Coronado Valentine's Day Fun Run
description: Experience the Coronado Valentine's Day Fun Run in San Diego, where runners of all levels can enjoy a scenic 10K, 5K, or 1-mile course at Coronado Tidelands Park. Participants receive a long-sleeve tech T-shirt, a heart gem finisher’s medal, and a unique relationship status bib to add a playful twist. Celebrate your achievement with finish-line food, live music, and the chance to win age-group award tikis. This event is perfect for those who love running, fun, and making memories with friends and family.

title: Oceanside International Film Festival
description: The Oceanside International Film Festival in San Diego, California, held at the historic Star Theatre, celebrates the art of filmmaking by showcasing a diverse range of stories from around the globe. With a mission to uplift voices from all backgrounds, the festival features an eclectic mix of genres, including narrative, documentary, animation, experimental, and student films. Attendees can immerse themselves in unique cinematic experiences that highlight cultural perspectives and creative storytelling. OIFF is dedicated to fostering appreciation for film as both an art form and a powerful tool for education and connection.

title: Leprechaun Run
description: The Leprechaun Run in San Diego is a festive and family-friendly event that brings the spirit of St. Patrick’s Day to life. Participants of all ages can don their green gear and join the fun in this spirited run, set against the beautiful backdrop of San Diego. The event typically includes various race distances, lively Irish music, and a post-run celebration with food and beverages. Perfect for runners, walkers, and those simply looking to celebrate, the Leprechaun Run offers a joyful and active way to honor St. Patrick’s Day.

title: Irish 4 A Day
description: Experience San Diego’s ultimate St. Patrick’s Day celebration at IRISH 4 A DAY, a lively party hop that brings together the city’s top nightclubs and bars for a festive Irish-themed adventure. Hosted by the creators of the popular San Diego Zombie Crawl, this event offers exclusive access, themed drinks, and entertainment across multiple venues, including the well-known American Junkie. Join fellow partygoers for a memorable day of music, dancing, and Irish cheer as you explore the heart of San Diego’s nightlife. Don your green attire and get ready to celebrate St. Patrick’s Day in true Irish style.

title: San Diego Latino Film Festival
description: The San Diego Latino Film Festival in San Diego, CA, United States, is a dynamic showcase of Latino filmmaking, featuring a curated selection of films that highlight the richness and diversity of Latino culture. Audiences can enjoy screenings of compelling narratives, insightful documentaries, and innovative shorts from both new voices and acclaimed directors. The festival also offers engaging Q&A sessions, filmmaker panels, and community events, creating a welcoming space for film lovers and industry professionals alike. This celebration of storytelling invites attendees to connect with the creativity and perspectives shaping Latino cinema today.

title: North Park Festival of Beers
description: Gather with a group of friends for a toast with the finest beers in the area at the North Park Festival of Beers. The festival features beer sampling from over 50 craft breweries, live music, and a variety of food booths. Share your love of beer with 5,000 other beer fanatics at the North Park Festival of Beers.

title: San Diego Beach and Bay Half Marathon, 5K, and 10K
description: The San Diego Beach and Bay Half Marathon, 5K, and 10K offers runners a scenic loop course that highlights the stunning coastline and bays of San Diego, California. Participants enjoy flat, fast routes that pass iconic spots like SeaWorld, Belmont Park, Mission Beach, Pacific Beach, and Sail Bay. Known for its minimal elevation gain, this event is ideal for both those seeking a personal best and those wanting to soak in the beauty of San Diego’s waterfront. Whether you’re a seasoned runner or a first-timer, this race promises an unforgettable experience along some of the city’s most picturesque paths.

title: Sycuan Pow Wow
description: The Sycuan Pow Wow in San Diego, California, welcomes the public to experience a celebration of Native American culture at the Sycuan Recreation Center. Open to all dancers, singers, and drum groups, this event offers a unique opportunity to witness traditional performances and connect with the community. With free admission, attendees can enjoy an inclusive atmosphere filled with music, dance, and cultural sharing. Whether you are a participant or a spectator, the Sycuan Pow Wow invites everyone to join in honoring Native traditions.

title: Oceanside Independence Day Parade
description: Experience the Oceanside Independence Parade in Oceanside, CA, a cherished community tradition that has brought residents and visitors together since 1892. This lively procession celebrates local heroes and American heritage, filling the streets with patriotic spirit and colorful displays. Join the excitement as the community comes together to honor the nation’s history and showcase Oceanside’s unique charm. This event is a highlight of the year, inviting everyone to participate and celebrate in true hometown style.

title: 4th of July Cruise on WDE
description: View SeaWorld's spectacular Independence Day fireworks display aboard a family-friendly 4th of July cruise on Mission Bay! Enjoy a live band, a live DJ, a cash bar with libations and snacks, a photo booth, and a memorable setting to watch the impressive fireworks show. Departing from the Bahia Resort Hotel, the three-level vintage-inspired sternwheeler boat makes the night even more magical.

title: Oceans at Night: Sharks
description: To celebrate Shark Summer, join us on July 9 to experience a night that's totally jaw-some during Oceans at Night: Sharks! Dive into a world of all things shark-related and discover the allure of these fascinating fish. This 21+ event features live entertainment, interactive games, a Kelp Forest Dive presentation and more! Meet shark experts from Scripps Oceanography, nerd out on all things sharks and enjoy an evening packed with music, games, tasty drinks and more! Tickets are on sale now.

title: Shark Summer
description: Shark Summer Returns to Birch Aquarium! This summer, Birch Aquarium is making a splash with the return of Shark Summer! Dive into the world of these amazing animals, with fin-tastic fun for shark fans of all ages! Shark Summer celebrates the vital role sharks play in the ecosystem, while shining a light on the important conservation work and research being done to protect them. Shark Summer kicks off on July 1 and runs through August 2. Offerings vary by day, check the Daily Schedule for the latest.

title: Clearly Indigenous
description: Clearly Indigenous: Native Visions Reimagined in Glass is an exhibition showcasing contemporary Native American and indigenous Pacific-Rim artists working in glass. The exhibition features approximately 120 glass art objects created by twenty-nine Native American artists, four Pacific Rim artists from New Zealand and Australia, and glass artist Dale Chihuly. It explores how Indigenous artists fuse heritage and contemporary glassmaking to illuminate their stories, connection to nature, and cultural traditions.

title: Buffalo Alley Trail Run
description: Prepare for a thrilling 10K trail run featuring a challenging hill climb, rolling hills along the ridgeline, and breathtaking views of surrounding mountains and meadows. For the younger crowd, a 2K flat trail run is also available, offering an equally exciting experience.

title: America’s Air Show
description: The 2026 Air Show is a grand celebration of 250 years of American spirit, innovation, and aviation excellence, making it the nation's largest military air show. Attendees can expect an unforgettable flight line experience featuring immersive experiences, military demonstration teams, civilian aerobatic performers, aerial solo acts, vintage aircraft, and iconic warbirds, all in a family-friendly environment that honors America's proud legacy and the future of flight.

title: Painted Prayers: The Japanese Folk Art Tradition of Ema
description: The Painted Prayers exhibition highlights the Japanese folk painting tradition of ema, which are house-shaped wooden votive plaques used as prayers in Shinto shrines and Buddhist temples. The exhibition presents a variety of ema, ranging from the 18th century to the present day, showcasing their colorful imagery and the prayers associated with them. Curated by Japanese art historian Meher McArthur, this is the first museum exhibition in the United States to display such an extensive collection of ema.

title: Skate Craft
description: Skate Craft celebrates skateboarding's do-it-yourself values, tracing its evolution from handmade decks and ramps to contemporary handcrafted art. The exhibition highlights the creativity, self-expression, and craftsmanship involved in skateboard design, safety gear, and skate shoes. It presents skateboarding as a form of living folk art that combines play, design, and sustainability.

title: Rock n Roll Running Series
description: <p>The Rock ‘n’ Roll Running Series was the first to flip the script by infusing running with music, energy, and entertainment. What started as a bold idea has grown into a global movement, with epic courses in iconic destinations and a finish line that transforms into a music festival. From 5Ks to marathons, there’s a <a href="https://balboapark.org/event/rock-n-roll-running-series/" class="more-link">...</a></p>\n

title: The Hombres
description: <p>For Héctor and his crew of construction workers, the job site is all about grit and bravado. When their catcalling and jokes draw complaints from the yoga studio next door, instructor Julian invites them to try a class. Soon, they’re forced to reexamine everything they think they know about strength and flexibility. From Tony Meneses <a href="https://balboapark.org/event/the-hombres/" class="more-link">...</a></p>\n

title: San Diego Pride
description: Raise your rainbow flag at San Diego Pride, known as the fourth largest pride in the USA, where thousands of people gather for a 5K race, a parade, and a festival to foster respect for the LGBTQ community. If you can’t wait to be inspired by these related events that serve well over 250,000 people during the celebration, then march down to San Diego Pride.

title: A Space for All of Us
description: Sensory-Friendly Quiet Mornings at the Museum The Museum’s sensory-friendly quiet hours are held every Sunday from 10 a.m. to 11 a.m. This time is dedicated to creating a calmer, quieter museum experience. We remain open to the public during this time, and all are welcome to visit the Museum. During this time, specific exhibit features ...

title: Art Mart
description: SDCAMA art shows display the living art of today; you can hold it in your hands and take it into your life. Many of our artist members are full time professionals that have been plying their trade for decades, have won competitions throughout the U.S., and are world renowned. Other members only have time to ...

address: Balboa Park Boulevard and Presidents Way Lawn Park Boulevard

title: Sunday Concert
description: SUNDAY CONCERTS A relaxed and fun way to enjoy one of San Diego´s most iconic venues. One hour performances all year-round shine or rain.
